task: Recover the failed post-merge passwordless preview Worker deployment and prevent transient Cloudflare D1 import failures from failing the workflow.
decisions: Rerun the failed main deployment before changing the repository; attempt 2 passed every migration, deployment and live route check.
Treat the observed long-running-import lock and earlier fetch failure as retryable remote D1 failures.
Use one shared wrapper for all six passwordless preview D1 imports instead of duplicating retry loops in workflow steps.
Retry only the two observed transient error signatures, with four attempts and three-second linear backoff.
Replace affected implementation-shape assertions in existing tests with assertions for the wrapper-based migration seam.
validation: simulated immediate-success and bounded retry-exhaustion wrapper checks: passed
npm run lint: passed with existing warnings only
npm run trace:validate and npm run trace:coverage: passed
residualRisks: The retry decision relies on Wrangler's current error text for the two observed transient failures.
Deterministic migration failures remain fail-fast and are not retried.
The retry wrapper is exercised with simulated Wrangler commands locally; the branch workflow supplies deployed-resource evidence.
